metadata.title: States PCS: Gujarat GK Questions for GPSC Exams

questions.question: From which saint of the Swaminarayan sect did Dalpatram receive his religious initiation?
questions.explanation: Dalpatram received religious initiation from Bhumanand Swami, a revered saint of the Swaminarayan sect.

questions.question: Which social issue is addressed in Dalpatram’s work Venthritra?
questions.explanation: Dalpatram’s Ventharitra highlights the social issue of exploitative begging, known as the “bafvidhwani” problem, focusing on alms-seeking behavior.

questions.question: Who composed the music for the film Gandhi, My Father?
questions.explanation: Uday Majmudar composed music for the film Gandhi, My Father, featuring spiritual songs like Raghupati Raghav Raja Ram.

questions.question: Which bund was constructed to prevent the eastern expansion of the Little Rann of Kutch and control saline water intrusion?
questions.explanation: Surajbari Bund was built to prevent the eastern expansion of the Little Rann of Kutch and control saline water intrusion.

questions.question: Who is the author of traditional Bhavai scripts such as ‘Jasma Odan’ and ‘Gunda Jhulan’, which are foundational to Gujarat’s Bhavai folk theatre tradition?
questions.explanation: Asait Thakar authored traditional Bhavai scripts like ‘Jasma Odan’, ‘Gunda Jhulan’, and ‘Raja Deghan’, foundational to Gujarat’s Bhavai folk theatre tradition.

questions.question: Whom did Kavi Kalapi describe as “khara ilmī, khara shūrā” in his works?
questions.explanation: Kavi Kalapi described Narsinh Mehta and Mirabai as “khara ilmī, khara shūrā,” meaning true scholars and true warriors.

questions.question: Who was the first editor of Buddhiprakash, the oldest Gujarati periodical established in 1850?
questions.explanation: Magnalal Vakilchand Sheth was the first editor of Buddhiprakash, Gujarat’s oldest Gujarati periodical established in 1850.

questions.question: Who edited the Rasmala, an important document detailing Gujarat’s royal lineages and history?
questions.explanation: Rasmala, edited by Alexander Forbes, documents Gujarat’s royal lineages, history, and folklore, serving as a key source on the region’s historical events and genealogies.

questions.question: At which railway junction was the unjust tax (jakat) collected that Motilal Darji reported to Mahatma Gandhi?
questions.explanation: Motilal Darji first informed Mahatma Gandhi about the unjust railway tax (jakat) collected at Viramgam Junction.

questions.question: Which Gujarati freedom fighter attempted to bomb Viceroy Minto and his wife in Ahmedabad in 1909?
questions.explanation: Mohanlal Pandya tried to bomb Viceroy Minto and his wife in Ahmedabad in 1909; he was known for his active resistance work in Gujarat and close ties with Gandhi and Patel.
